Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the given process tree model and identify why its underfitting The process is Procure to Pay The intended sequence Create PR Approve PR Create PO Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The current model has a parallel block for steps 3 to 7 after Create and Approve Requisition then Close Case at end That means these five activities can occur in any order or concurrently

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Create PO must happen before receiving goods since goods receipt references PO Also invoice receipt should not happen before PO exists Match requires both PO and invoice and logically also follows the receipt steps Pay follows match Close case after pay

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The current model allows paying the invoice before receiving goods or receiving the invoice and also allows receiving goods before creating the purchase order because create PO is inside the parallel block

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We should restrict the model so that create purchase order is sequentially before the later fulfillment and settlement steps and only allow limited flexibility where it is domain appropriate

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Receive Goods and Receive Invoice could potentially be concurrent or happen in either order in practice but both must be completed before Match Invoice to PO and Pay Invoice must remain after Match

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The safest corrected structure is Create Requisition Approve Requisition Create PO then a block that requires both Receive Goods and Receive Invoice then Match Invoice to PO then Pay Invoice then Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: One approach is to use a parallel operator only for Receive Goods and Receive Invoice because both must execute and the process can continue only after both are completed Then Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice and Close Case follow in sequence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This enforces that PO creation happens before goods receipt and invoice receipt It does not allow matching until both receipts are done nor payment before matching It also ensures close case after payment
